wins.event: Net income $13B, EPS $4.63, ROTCE 18% Q4; FY ROTCE 20% (excluding items)
Equities trading revenue +40% YoY with strong Prime performance; Fixed income +7%
AWM long-term net inflows $52B Q4 and $209B FY; record $553B total client asset inflows
1.7M net new checking accounts, 10.4M new card accounts, record households in wealth management
Strong CIB pipeline with constructive market dynamics for 2026 deal activity

risks.event: $2.2B reserve build in CCB for Apple Card forward purchase commitment ($0.50+ EPS hit)
2026 adjusted expense guide $105B — meaningful YoY growth in absolute and percentage terms
Card net charge-off rate guided to ~3.4% for 2026
Regulatory overhang: potential credit-card interest-rate price controls would be 'significant challenge'
NBFI lending exposure ~$160B with novel risk components; stablecoin/GENIUS Act parallel-banking concerns

guidance.notes: 2026 NII ex Markets reaffirmed at ~$95B; total NII ~$103B; expense ~$105B (already pre-communicated at industry conference in December). FY 2025 results strong but Q4 weighed by Apple Card reserve.

_notes: Solid execution but several offsetting risks (Apple Card reserve, expense growth, regulatory). CFO Jeremy was analytical and measured, not euphoric. Existing pipelines may have over-weighted the strong equity-trading print. Realised excess_5d -1.2% — modest miss, not a tone-extraction failure but possibly a feature gap on regulatory uncertainty discount.
